properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v2 v4 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This one thing I need Lord, immerse me in Your glory Heaven has released Your anointing saturating me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I lay me Down in the rivers of Your presence This is what I've been waiting for Here is my heart surrendered, Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This one thing I need Lord, to know You, oh so deeply Overwhelm my soul Holy Spirit You can have everything

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let Your Spirit flood me Wash over, saturate me This is what I've been waiting for Here is my heart surrendered, Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: I give all, I give all Lord take me deeper than I've ever been I let go, I let go Heaven is open and I'm diving in :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I give all, I give all Lord take me deeper than I've ever been I let go, I let go Heaven is open and I'm diving into You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I give all, I give all Lord take me deeper than I've ever been I let go, I let go Heaven is open and I'm diving in

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I give all, I give all Lord take me deeper than I've ever been I let go, I let go

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Heaven is open and I'm diving into You, to You Heaven is open and I'm diving into You, to You Heaven is open and I'm diving into You, to You Heaven is open and I'm diving into You, to You Heaven is open and I'm diving into You, to You Heaven is open and I'm diving into You, to You Heaven is open and I'm diving into You
